task: put the item in the middle drawer
raw:
SCENE ANALYSIS - A small purple cube sits on a brown drawer front. The drawer has a metallic handle. The cube is rigid and small; the drawer is a container with a handle for opening. STRATEGY - First, grasp the cube. Then, move to the drawer handle. Pull the drawer open to create space. Place the cube inside the drawer. Finally, push the drawer closed. Failure modes include dropping the cube, misaligning the drawer, or failing to grasp the cube. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the cube body; Step 2 grasp the cube; Step 3 reach the drawer handle; Step 4 pull the drawer; Step 5 place the cube inside; Step 6 push the drawer.
Goal: inside(purple_cube, middle_drawer); closed(middle_drawer)
Scene: purple_cube, middle_drawer
Step 1: reach(purple_cube)
  affordance_region: the body of the purple cube
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, purple_cube, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, purple_cube) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(purple_cube)
  affordance_region: the body of the purple cube
  contact: holding(purple_cube) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(purple_cube)
Step 3: reach(middle_drawer)
  affordance_region: the metallic handle of the middle drawer
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, middle_drawer, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, middle_drawer) < 0.03
Step 4: pull(middle_drawer)
  affordance_region: the metallic handle of the middle drawer
  contact: holding(middle_drawer) [completion]
  direction: pull_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: open(middle_drawer)
Step 5: place(purple_cube -> middle_drawer)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the middle drawer
  contact: surface_contact(purple_cube, middle_drawer) [completion]; released(purple_cube) [completion]
  pose: inside(purple_cube, middle_drawer) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(purple_cube, middle_drawer) AND released(purple_cube)
Step 6: push(middle_drawer)
  affordance_region: the metallic handle of the middle drawer
  contact: holding(middle_drawer) [completion]
  direction: push_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: closed(middle_drawer)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the purple cube
the body of the purple cube
the metallic handle of the middle drawer
the metallic handle of the middle drawer
an empty area inside the middle drawer
the metallic handle of the middle drawer
